ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the weather station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., surface, radar, satellite) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station that collected the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "temperature_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature (°C) */,
  "temperature_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature (°C) */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Total rainfall (mm) */,
  "rain_days" INTEGER /* Number of rain days */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed (m/s) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity (%) */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Average pressure (hPa) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  "month_order" INTEGER /* Order of the month in the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yearly_data" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yearly data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station that collected the data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "temperature_min_avg" REAL /* Average minimum temperature (°C) */,
  "temperature_max_avg" REAL /* Average maximum temperature (°C) */,
  "rainfall_avg" REAL /* Average total rainfall (mm) */,
  "rain_days_avg" REAL /* Average number of rain days */,
  "wind_speed_avg" REAL /* Average wind speed (m/s) */,
  "humidity_avg" REAL /* Average humidity (%) */,
  "pressure_avg" REAL /* Average pressure (hPa) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yearly_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_data" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monthly data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station that collected the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "temperature_min_avg" REAL /* Average minimum temperature (°C) */,
  "temperature_max_avg" REAL /* Average maximum temperature (°C) */,
  "rainfall_avg" REAL /* Average total rainfall (mm) */,
  "rain_days_avg" REAL /* Average number of rain days */,
  "wind_speed_avg" REAL /* Average wind speed (m/s) */,
  "humidity_avg" REAL /* Average humidity (%) */,
  "pressure_avg" REAL /* Average pressure (hPa) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, forecaster, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station that generated the forecast */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was generated */,
  "temperature_min" REAL /* Predicted minimum temperature (°C) */,
  "temperature_max" REAL /* Predicted maximum temperature (°C) */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Predicted total rainfall (mm) */,
  "rain_days" INTEGER /* Predicted number of rain days */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Predicted wind speed (m/s) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Predicted humidity (%) */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Predicted pressure (hPa) */,
  "forecast_model" TEXT /* Model used for the forecast (e.g., GFS, ECMWF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warnings" (
  "warning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warning */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station that generated the warning */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the warning was generated */,
  "warning_type" TEXT /* Type of warning (e.g., tornado, flood) */,
  "warning_message" TEXT /* Warning message */,
  "warning_level" TEXT /* Level of the warning (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warnings_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisories" (
  "advisory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisory */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station that generated the advisory */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the advisory was generated */,
  "advisory_type" TEXT /* Type of advisory (e.g., wind, lightning) */,
  "advisory_message" TEXT /* Advisory message */,
  "advisory_level" TEXT /* Level of the advisory (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advisories_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being assessed */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score (0-1) */,
  "quality_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., weather station, radar, satellite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit for the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_types_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the unit (e.g., °C, mm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_data" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data used in the project */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data used in the project (e.g., temperature, rainfall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., lead researcher, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)
